name: Stop Pat Toomey
subject: BREAKING: GOP ad buy
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4967806964101808128/6824665375070748672?refcode=e20160522&refcode2=e20160522nd&amount=25)
---
BREAKING: U.S. Chamber of Commerce launches TV ad attacking Katie's record
[**Katie needs your urgent support: FIGHT BACK NOW >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4967806964101808128/6824665375070748672?refcode=e20160522&refcode2=e20160522nd&amount=25) Friend, the U.S. Chamber of Commerce, is back on the attack in Pennsylvania.

**They 're spending another $466,745 on their latest ads.** That means, in total, we've been hit by nearly $1.5 million in Republican special interest money attacking Katie and defending Pat Toomey's failed record in Washington.

The path to a Democratic held Senate runs through Pennsylvania, so you can bet that special interests will stop at nothing to buy Toomey's seat. **We 've upped our May fundraising goal to respond and fight back -- we can't afford to fall short.**

[**Katie and our team need to raise $25,000 by midnight tomorrow to counter these attacks. Make an urgent donation of $5 or whatever you can now >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4967806964101808128/6824665375070748672?refcode=e20160522&refcode2=e20160522nd&amount=25)

Toomey and his special interest allies have been attacking Katie since her FIRST DAY as the Democratic nominee. They're reading the same news and polls we're seeing: _NPR_ ranks Toomey as one of the top five most vulnerable sitting Senators and _Quinnipiac Polling_ shows Pennsylvania's Senate race is TIED (McGinty: 44, Toomey: 45).

We need to show Toomey and his pals that every time they attack this campaign, we'll fight back that much harder. [**Donate to Katie today so we can hit our May fundraising goal and show our opponents the strength of our grassroots campaign.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4967806964101808128/6824665375070748672?refcode=e20160522&refcode2=e20160522nd&amount=25)

Thanks,

Stop Pat Toomey
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4967806964101808128/6824665375070748672?refcode=e20160522&refcode2=e20160522nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/4967806964101808128/6752607781032820736).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Bernie endorses Tim Canova vs. Rep. Wasserman Schultz
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
The political revolution is not just about electing a president, sisters and brothers. We need a Congress with members who believe, like Bernie, that we cannot change a corrupt system by taking its money.
So let me introduce you to Tim Canova, a progressive challenger who is running against Rep. Debbie Wasserman Schultz in a Democratic primary in Florida this year.
Tim endorsed Bernie's presidential campaign, and was inspired to run because of Wasserman Schultz' support of the Trans-Pacific Partnership. His campaign is funded like ours, by lots of people giving small amounts of money.
And on issues like taking on Wall Street, making tuition free at public colleges, and reforming our broken campaign finance system, he is someone you can be proud to support. That's why Bernie is endorsing Tim's campaign, and why we're proud to ask:
[**Splitting a $2.70 contribution between Bernie 2016 and Tim Canova for Congress will help elect progressives up and down the ballot while sending an UNMISTAKABLE message about our political revolution 's commitment to electing candidates who share our values.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/canova-for-congress?refcode=em160522-sub-c "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/canova-for-congress?refcode=em160522-sub-c")
A few weeks ago, we raised a tremendous amount of money for three progressive candidates for Congress. Your support changed their races overnight. In the days ahead, we're going to add a dozen or more additional candidates to that list.
We're doing this because it is too late for establishment politics and establishment economics. We need real change. We need U.S. Senators, members of Congress and state legislators who have the guts to take on the big money interests whose greed is destroying the American middle class.
Tim Canova is one of those candidates, and I hope you'll join Bernie in support of his campaign:
[**Split a $2.70 contribution between Bernie 2016 and Tim Canova for Congress today. This is important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/canova-for-congress?refcode=em160522-sub-c "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/canova-for-congress?refcode=em160522-sub-c")
Thank you for powering this political revolution.
All my best,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/canova-for-congress?refcode=em160522-sub-c "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/canova-for-congress?refcode=em160522-sub-c")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: DemocraticSenate@maggiehassan.com
subject: A Mitch McConnell-controlled Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd32b/2a380d31/13e04b63/f84c49/755776823/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd32b/2a380d31/13e04b63/f84c49/755776823/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd32b/2a380d31/13e04b63/f84c4a/755776823/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNTIyYW0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160522am-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")Friends,
Let this sink in: The next president -- potentially a President Trump -- could nominate FOUR Supreme Court justices.
That's just one more reason Granite Staters like you need a Senator who will put New Hampshire first, not kowtow to party leadership. We can't allow a Mitch McConnell-controlled Senate to confirm Donald Trump's right-wing nominees to the Court.
**We've set up our Secure the Supreme Court Fund to make sure that doesn't happen, and we're counting on you to make sure we raise $40,000 by midnight on Monday to win.**
**[Become a founding donor and give $3, or whatever you can, to help Maggie win here in New Hampshire, take back the Senate, and keep the Supreme Court out of the hands of Donald Trump and Kelly Ayotte.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd32b/2a380d31/13e04b63/f84c4a/755776823/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNTIyYW0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160522am-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
The latest poll shows this race is a virtual tie, and Republicans have already spent more than _$8 MILLION_ to make sure Maggie doesn't win. With stakes this high, champions for hard-working families like Jeanne Shaheen are all in to ensure that Maggie wins in New Hampshire and that we turn the Senate blue.
They know Maggie is our best shot at taking back the Senate, protecting the future of the Supreme Court, and getting Congress working for hard-working families. But she and Maggie need this grassroots team behind them.
**Every dollar you can give makes a difference. Please donate anything you can today.**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Click to donate $3.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd32b/2a380d31/13e04b63/f84c4b/755776823/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNTIyYW0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVVGeWNtRjVRU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjMifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160522am-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=3")**

**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd32b/2a380d31/13e04b63/f84c4a/755776823/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNTIyYW0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160522am-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Fair-Elections@KatieMcGinty.com
subject: appalling and deeply unfair
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4899128169296035840/-3623685760428802048?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gerrymanderingja)
---
Friend -- Pennsylvania is one of the most gerrymandered states in the country.

After the 2010 Census, the Republican controlled state legislature was able to redraw the Congressional map to keep Republican incumbents as safe as possible. **In other words, partisan lawmakers manipulated the electoral lines of districts to keep their party in the majority.**

Let's be clear: Gerrymandering is the opposite of democratic. It discounts the voices of thousands, if not millions, of voters. And we must stand together to end it. [**Will you add your name to join Katie in calling for an end to right-wing gerrymandering?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4899128169296035840/-3623685760428802048?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gerrymanderingja)

The _Washington Post_ reports that gerrymandering has resulted in Democrats being underrepresented by about _18 seats_ in the House of Representatives. **And the _Post_ ranked Pennsylvania's own seventh Congressional district as one of the top ten most rigged districts in the nation!**

This is appalling, and deeply unfair to voters in our state and across the country who deserve to have their own voices, and vote, count just as equally.

[**To make our elections truly democratic, we need to end gerrymandering. Will you sign Katie 's petition?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4899128169296035840/-3623685760428802048?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gerrymanderingja)

Thank you,

Team Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4899128169296035840/-3479570572352946176?refcode=e20160522.2&refcode2=e20160522.2&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/4899128169296035840/-3695743354466729984).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Mandi Karp
subject: URGENT: we're failing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2385/738133e4/352b11f4/7f827a9b/2629260483/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160522?refcode=pme160522_m&recurring=true&amount=25")
---
| Hey again, guys -- I hate to be emailing you on a Sunday, but I knew you would want to hear this right away.

A poll just came out with us up by 3 points, but most voters are undecided. AND National Republicans launched their first attack against us this week. The voters are going to hear the GOP's ugly lies if we don't raise enough money to get our message out. We need to get $5,000 in the door by midnight if we want to have any hope of fighting back.

**And right now, we 're FAILING. This could be catastrophic for our chances of retaking Rubio's seat -- and our chances of a Democratic Senate.**

**We still have a shot. I need 50 people to take action NOW. Will you step up to turn this thing around and retake the Senate?** | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2385/738133e4/352b11f4/7f827a94/2629260483/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160522?refcode=pme160522_m&recurring=true&amount=3")

[](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2385/738133e4/352b11f4/7f827a96/2629260483/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160522?refcode=pme160522_m&recurring=true&amount=50")
[](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2385/738133e4/352b11f4/7f827a97/2629260483/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160522?refcode=pme160522_m&recurring=true")
I'm working all weekend running the numbers. Can't wait to see your gift come in.

Thanks,

Mandi Karp
Finance Director
Murphy for Florida
Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2385/738133e4/352b11f4/7f827a90/2629260483/VEsB/ "http://murphyforflorida.com") This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
